overview.description: The ActivePassive Core Bond ETF (APCB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US Aggregate index. The fund is an actively managed fund that blends active and passive investment strategies. The fund seeks to provide current income with low volatility of principal APCB was launched on May 3, 2023 and is issued by Envestnet.
